name: Caribbean Cooler
recipeInstructions:
1. Into a cocktail shaker or similar container, add the following ingredients: orgeat syrup, fresh lemon juice, bitters, ground nutmeg, fresh orange juice, and crushed ice.
2. Shake well until combined.
3. Strain into chilled champagne glasses filled with ice cubes.
4. Garnish with lime slices if desired.
Note: The orgeat syrup can be found in specialty food stores and some coffee stores.
This recipe won an award for Robert Parsons of the Benson Hotel, Portland, in an Automobile Club of Oregon Zero Proof MixOff contest.
